description: Data import preview panel with title, description, content area for displaying imported data, and confirm/cancel action buttons with loading state.

parameters.name: OnConfirm
parameters.description: Fires when the user confirms the import.

parameters.name: ConfirmText
parameters.description: Custom confirm button text. Falls back to localized default.

parameters.name: CancelText
parameters.description: Custom cancel button text. Falls back to localized default.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: Shows loading state on confirm button.

examples.title: Import preview with data table
examples.code:
<TmImportPreview Title="Preview Import" Description="Review the data below before confirming." OnConfirm="@HandleConfirm" OnCancel="@HandleCancel" IsLoading="@isImporting">
    <TmDataTable Items="@previewRows" />
</TmImportPreview>

examples.title: Import preview with custom button text
examples.code: @previewRows.Count rows will be imported.
